heading: Three Principals. One Standard. Shared Credibility.
intro: Capital requires proof, not promises. SBP sits at the intersection of energy disclosure mandates and mining infrastructure — converting compliance requirements into structured access.

columns.title: Mining Partners
columns.intro: Verified energy credentials convert clean energy investment into auditable, institution-ready proof.
bullets: [Institutional credibility: SBP verification vs. self-reported claims]
[Capital access: verified status unlocks ESG-mandated allocator pools]
[Competitive edge: energy credentials as a long-term capital differentiator]

columns.title: Sustainable BTC
columns.intro: SBP verifies and attests — neutral, cryptographically anchored, permanently auditable.
bullets: [Attestation layer: cryptographic anchoring and ISO-aligned records]
[Protocol neutrality: standards-aligned infrastructure, not an advocate]
[Compliance-ready data: audit trails that plug into institutional workflows]

columns.title: Investment Partners
columns.intro: Disclosure mandates no longer block exposure — SBP converts compliance constraints into structured access.
bullets: [ESG compatibility: verified mining satisfies cross-jurisdiction disclosure requirements]
